name: Summer Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds yellow summer squash or Zucchini, sliced 1/4 inch thick
1 can condensed cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the sliced squash, carrots, and onion in boiling water for 5 minutes or less.
2. Combine the soup and sour cream. Fold in the drained vegetables.
3. Combine the stuffing mix and butter. Spread half of this mixture in the bottom of a 12 x 7 1/2 x 2-inch baking pan.
4. Spoon the vegetable mixture on top, then sprinkle the remaining stuffing over the vegetables.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
